PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('v1')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('fun1')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('v2')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('fun2')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('v3')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('v4')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"Chained assignment is allowed in future parser"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('also')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(+=)('+=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('append')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(+=)('+=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"can be chained"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('also')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(-=)('-=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('append')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(-=)('-=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"can be chained"')
